note: crypto_market_sections: finance-agent (llm_analyze + KB) when CRYPTO_CONTEXT_LLM=1; else heuristic.

crypto_market_sections.title: BTC exchange / whales
crypto_market_sections.analysis: Lead: BTC Exchange Inflow Total is at 473.8. Per the bundled guide: High spike → Panic selling risk or whale accumulation. Supporting: BTC Exchange Netflow (-13.61) — Positive → Bearish (Dump risk). Negative → Bullish (Supply squeeze). Overall: vendor hints in this block skew constructive — use as context, not a standalone trigger.

crypto_market_sections.title: Stablecoin (CEX)
crypto_market_sections.analysis: Lead: Stablecoin Exchange Inflow Total is at 37.5M. Per the bundled guide: High spike → Buying pressure building. Combined with BTC inflow = volatility indicator. Supporting: Stablecoin Exchange Netflow (4.86M) — Positive → Bullish (Cash ready). Negative → Bearish (Profit-taking). Overall: mixed / balanced reads in this block — align with your TA and risk rules.

crypto_market_sections.title: Miners
crypto_market_sections.analysis: Lead: BTC Miner Netflow Total is at 28.29. Per the bundled guide: Positive & rising → Miners dumping (Bearish). Negative & falling → Miners accumulating (Bullish). Supporting: BTC Miners Position Index (-1.309) — >2.0 → Miner dump risk (Bearish, veto longs). <0.5 → Miner confidence (Bullish confirmation). Overall: mixed / balanced reads in this block — align with your TA and risk rules.

crypto_market_sections.title: Derivatives
crypto_market_sections.analysis: Lead: BTC Funding Rates is at -0.003114. Per the bundled guide: >0.05% → Market overheated (Longs will be liquidated). <-0.05% → Market capitulated (Shorts will be liquidated, reversal coming). Supporting: BTC Long Liquidations (0) — Spike → Forced selling, price accelerates down. High > short liq → Bears winning. Overall: vendor hints in this block skew cautious — use as context, not a standalone trigger.

crypto_market_sections.title: Valuation
crypto_market_sections.analysis: Lead: BTC MVRV Ratio is at 1.349. Per the bundled guide: >3.7 → Use half position size (expensive). <1 → Use 1.5x size (cheap). Not for entry timing. Overall: mixed / balanced reads in this block — align with your TA and risk rules.

crypto_market_sections.title: Liquidity / context
crypto_market_sections.analysis: Lead: BTC Exchange Supply Ratio is at 0.133. Per the bundled guide: High (>8%) → Dump risk. Low (<3%) → Squeeze risk (illiquid, big moves). Supporting: BTC Fund Flow Ratio (0.02082) — High (>0.15) → Market is active, expect whipsaw. Low (<0.05) → Market is calm. Overall: mixed / balanced reads in this block — align with your TA and risk rules.

crypto_market_sections.title: Institutional
crypto_market_sections.analysis: Lead: BTC Coinbase Premium Gap is at 42.84. Per the bundled guide: Wide positive gap → Institutional demand strong. Wide negative gap → Institutional supply strong. Supporting: BTC Coinbase Premium Index (0.05865) — Positive & rising → Institutions confident (trust the move). Negative & falling → Institutions exiting (warning sign). Overall: mixed / balanced reads in this block — align with your TA and risk rules.
